  1. team44.project2.model

Uses of Package
team44.project2.model

Packages that use team44.project2.model
Package
Description
team44.project2.controller.cashier
Controllers for the cashier-facing screens of the point-of-sale application.
team44.project2.controller.cashier.payment
Controllers that manage the payment workflow after a cashier finalises a cart.
team44.project2.controller.manager.employees
Controllers for the employee-management screens accessible to managers.
team44.project2.service
Application-scoped service classes that encapsulate the business logic and direct database access for the point-of-sale system.
team44.project2.service.inventory
Service classes for inventory management operations.
  • Classes in team44.project2.model used by team44.project2.controller.cashier
    Class
    Description
    Customer
    Immutable record representing a customer of the cafe, containing personal details, contact information, accumulated reward points, and the date they joined the loyalty programme.
  • Classes in team44.project2.model used by team44.project2.controller.cashier.payment
    Class
    Description
    Customer
    Immutable record representing a customer of the cafe, containing personal details, contact information, accumulated reward points, and the date they joined the loyalty programme.
  • Classes in team44.project2.model used by team44.project2.controller.manager.employees
    Class
    Description
    Employee
    Immutable record representing a cafe employee, containing personal details, job role, start date, email address, a salted+hashed password, and whether the account is currently active.
  • Classes in team44.project2.model used by team44.project2.service
    Class
    Description
    Customer
    Immutable record representing a customer of the cafe, containing personal details, contact information, accumulated reward points, and the date they joined the loyalty programme.
    Employee
    Immutable record representing a cafe employee, containing personal details, job role, start date, email address, a salted+hashed password, and whether the account is currently active.
  • Classes in team44.project2.model used by team44.project2.service.inventory
    Class
    Description
    Inventory
    Immutable record representing a single inventory item in the cafe's inventory management system, including current quantity, reorder threshold, unit of measurement, supplier cost, and the date it was last restocked.
    RestockOrder
    Immutable record representing a restock order placed by an employee to replenish a low-stock inventory item, tracking the quantity ordered, order timestamp, and current fulfilment status.
